svg.content:
<mxfile host="65bd71144e"> <diagram name="ROS2 Walking Architecture" id="ros2-walking-arch"> <mxGraphModel dx="1200" dy="900" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1200" pageHeight="900" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0"/> <mxCell id="1" parent="0"/>
<!-- Title --> <mxCell id="title" value="BSL-Droid ROS 2 Walking System Architecture" style="text;html=1;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;align=center;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="250" y="20" width="500" height="30" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- Legend --> <mxCell id="leg1" value="Existing" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="820" y="20" width="80" height="30" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg2" value="New" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="910" y="20" width="80" height="30" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg3" value="Hardware" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="1000" y="20" width="80" height="30" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- Input Layer --> <mxCell id="gamepad" value="F710r Gamepad" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="80" width="180" height="50" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="joy" value="joy_node" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="190" width="180" height="50" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="teleop" value="biped_teleop_node" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="320" width="180" height="50" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- Central Processing --> <mxCell id="rl_policy" value="biped_rl_policy_node (50Hz)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="340" y="320" width="250" height="50" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- ros2_control Layer --> <mxCell id="fwd_ctrl" value="forward_position_controller (200Hz)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="340" y="450" width="250" height="50" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="jsb" value="joint_state_broadcaster" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="680" y="450" width="220" height="50" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- Hardware Interface --> <mxCell id="hw" value="robstride_hardware" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="460" y="570" width="220" height="50" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="motors" value="RS02 Motors x10 (CAN bus)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="460" y="680" width="220" height="50" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- IMU --> <mxCell id="imu_hw" value="IMU Sensor" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="780" y="680" width="180" height="50" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="imu_drv" value="imu_driver" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="780" y="570" width="180" height="50" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- Safety --> <mxCell id="safety" value="biped_safety_node (200Hz)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="530" width="220" height="50" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- Visualization --> <mxCell id="rsp" value="robot_state_publisher" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="680" y="320" width="220" height="50" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="rviz" value="RViz2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="680" y="190" width="220" height="50" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- Edges --> <mxCell id="e1" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" parent="1" source="gamepad" target="joy" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" parent="1" source="joy" target="teleop" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" parent="1" source="teleop" target="rl_policy" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" parent="1" source="rl_policy" target="fwd_ctrl" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" parent="1" source="fwd_ctrl" target="hw" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" parent="1" source="hw" target="motors" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" parent="1" source="hw" target="jsb" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" parent="1" source="jsb" target="rl_policy" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e9" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" parent="1" source="jsb" target="rsp" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e10" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" parent="1" source="rsp" target="rviz" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e11" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" parent="1" source="imu_hw" target="imu_drv" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e12" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" parent="1" source="imu_drv" target="rl_policy" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e13" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" parent="1" source="jsb" target="safety" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e14" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" parent="1" source="imu_drv" target="safety" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e15" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" parent="1" source="teleop" target="safety" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
